name: Smørrebrød (Denmark)
recipeIngredient: 6 Eggs, hard-cooked and cut into quarters
12 Shelled and deveined cooked small shrimp
3 ounces each smoked salmon, smoked herring, or whitefish, thinly sliced
2 ounces each sliced boiled ham, rare roast beef
2 ounces each Danish blue cheese, Danish hard cheese, cut into cubes
3 medium Tomatoes, cut into wedges or sliced
3 small Apples, cored, cut into wedges, and dipped in lemon juice
6 Dill pickles, cut lengthwise into quarters
recipeInstructions:
1. Line 2 large wooden serving boards or 2 trays with 4 lettuce leaves each.
2. On each board (or tray), decoratively arrange:
- 12 egg quarters
- 6 shrimp
- 1 1/2 ounces each salmon, herring, or whitefish, thinly sliced
- 1 ounce each ham, roast beef, and cheeses
- Half each of the tomatoes and fruits (apples and oranges)
- 1/4 cup onion slices
- 12 olives
- 12 pickle spears
3. Spoon mayonnaise, mustard, horseradish, and cocktail sauce into individual serving dishes and set out near serving boards.
4. Serve bread slices and crispbread in a napkin-lined basket.
5. Makes 12 servings.
